evals.prompt: /debate Remote work is better than office work for software engineers
evals.expected_output: Report has both Pro and Con sections populated with at least 3 findings each. Debate runs at least 1 rebuttal round. Summary counts are non-zero. Trace section shows specific attacks and responses (not generic).

evals.prompt: /debate GraphQL should replace REST for all new APIs
evals.expected_output: Pro covers type-safety, single-fetch, or schema-driven tooling. Con covers caching, operational complexity, or N+1 risk. At least one finding reaches 'negated' status across rounds. Trace shows the negating attack explicitly.

evals.prompt: /debate Unit tests are more valuable than integration tests for catching regressions
evals.expected_output: Debate runs at least 2 rebuttal rounds with non-trivial back-and-forth. At least one finding is marked 'disputed' (attacked then successfully defended). Report renders all four sections (Summary, Pro, Con, Negated/Disputed, Trace).
